digest.en: Iraq's Prime Minister-designate is thrust into a US-Iran power struggle. Australia plans to tax Meta, Google, and TikTok to fund newsrooms, a move that contrasts with the US's focus on geopolitical issues. The White House is engaged in diplomatic efforts, highlighted by King Charles's remarks.
digest.hi: एशिया-पसिफ़िक क्षेत्र में जल्द ही गाड़ियां और हवाई जहाज 100% एथेनॉल पर दौड़ते नजर आ सकते हैं। इस क्षेत्र में ग्रीन फ्यूल की मंजूरी मिलने के बाद यह संभव हो पाएगा। मेटा-गूगल और टिकटॉक पर टैक्स लगाने का प्रस्ताव भी चर्चा में है।

articles.title: Iraq’s Prime Minister-Designate Thrust Into U.S.-Iran Power Struggle
articles.summary: Ali al-Zaidi is tasked with forming a new Iraqi government amid US pressure to curb Iranian influence. Ali al-Zaidi, a political unknown, has been tasked with forming a new coalition government.

articles.title: Australia moves to tax Meta, Google and TikTok to fund newsrooms
articles.summary: Australia plans to tax Meta, Google, and TikTok to fund newsrooms through draft legislation by July. Australia is proposing to tax Meta, Google and TikTok a proportion of their revenue to pay for news reporters.

articles.title: US, allies release joint statement supporting Panama's sovereignty
articles.summary: The US and allies released a joint statement supporting Panama's sovereignty. US, allies release joint statement supporting Panama's sovereignty.

articles.title: White House hails ‘two kings’ as King Charles delivers pointed remarks
articles.summary: King Charles III hailed US-UK ties at a White House state dinner. King Charles III has hailed US-UK ties at a state dinner in the White House. White House hails ‘two kings’ as King Charles delivers pointed remarks.

articles.title: Afghan students recount harrowing university strike
articles.summary: Afghan students described a missile hitting their university, with officials blaming Pakistan for the attack. Afghan students have described the moment a missile hit their university. Officials blame Pakistan for Monday’s attack.

articles.title: US Senate blocks bid to stop Trump using military against Cuba
articles.summary: The US Senate blocked a bid to stop President Trump using military force against Cuba. Senator Tim Kaine criticized the move, saying if another country did to the US what it was doing to Cuba, it would be considered an act of war.

articles.title: UN aid chief says situation in Somalia worsened by US war on Iran
articles.summary: UN relief coordinator Tom Fletcher said the situation in Somalia has worsened due to the US war on Iran. He made these comments during a visit to the country. UN relief coordinator Tom Fletcher has slammed the war on Iran during a visit to Somalia.

articles.title: ​Battle of wills: On the U.S. war on Iran
articles.summary: The US war on Iran has led to a standoff over the Strait of Hormuz. The US should lift its blockade to allow Iran to open the strategic waterway. The U. S.

articles.title: Karachi Residents Store Cooking Gas In Balloons Amid Fuel Shortage: Report
articles.summary: Residents in Karachi are storing cooking gas in balloons due to a severe fuel shortage. Locals described this method as a "last resort" amid the crisis. Locals described the method as a "last resort," citing the severity of the gas crisis.

articles.title: ‘You'd be speaking French’: King Charles roasts Trump at state dinner
articles.summary: King Charles joked about Donald Trump's comments on European allies at a state dinner. He said to Trump, "You'd be speaking French" if not for NATO. As the heads of state traded jokes during their dinner toasts, King Charles referenced previous comments by Mr.

articles.title: US, Latin America countries criticise China’s retaliation over Panama Canal
articles.summary: US and Latin American countries have criticized China's detention of nearly 70 Panamanian-flagged ships in retaliation for a Supreme Court ruling on the Panama Canal. The move has sparked diplomatic tensions between China and the US.

articles.title: Iran Embassy Urges Expats To 'Sacrifice Their Lives', UK Reacts Strongly
articles.summary: The Iranian embassy has urged expats to "sacrifice their lives" in a message defended by the embassy as a call to patriotism. The UK has reacted strongly to the statement, expressing concern for the safety of British citizens in Iran.

articles.title: UAE leaves OPEC and OPEC+ in huge blow to global oil producers' group
articles.summary: The UAE has left OPEC and OPEC+, citing criticism from fellow Arab states for not protecting it from Iranian attacks. The move is a significant blow to the global oil producers' group.

articles.title: ‘It will never cover what’s authentic’: African music industry weighs up AI risks and rewards
articles.summary: The African music industry is weighing the risks and rewards of AI technology, with some artists embracing its potential while others stress its limitations. Nigerian singer-songwriter Fave has integrated AI into her music to counter unauthorized versions.

articles.title: NASA's Artemis II moonship returns home to its launch site after historic voyage
articles.summary: NASA's Artemis II moonship returned to its launch site after a historic voyage. The mission marked a significant milestone in the US space program. NASA's Artemis II moonship returns home to its launch site after historic voyage.

articles.title: Protecting U.S. Critical Infrastructure as Global Tensions Rise
articles.summary: As global tensions rise, the US is prioritizing the protection of its critical infrastructure, including power grids and transportation systems. Protecting U. S. Critical Infrastructure as Global Tensions Rise Security Magazine.

articles.title: U.S. imposes sanctions on 35 individuals, entities for aiding Iran's sanctions evasions
articles.summary: The US imposed sanctions on 35 individuals and entities for aiding Iran's sanctions evasions to disrupt Tehran's payment mechanisms. The designations were intended to expose and disrupt the mechanisms used by Tehran to receive payment for oil and other commodities and reduce its revenue, Treasury said.

articles.title: Iran conflict threatens global energy security and economic growth
articles.summary: The Iran conflict poses a threat to global energy security and economic growth. Rising tensions in the region could disrupt oil supplies, impacting the global economy. Iran conflict threatens global energy security and economic growth news. cgtn. com.

articles.title: Trump says King Charles does not want Iran to have nuclear weapon
articles.summary: US President Trump stated that King Charles does not want Iran to possess a nuclear weapon. This comment was made during a tense period in US-UK relations. The event was held on the second ‌day of a four-day visit to the United States at a tense time in ties, ‌after Mr.

articles.title: King Charles Urges Strong NATO Role Amid Ukraine War
articles.summary: King Charles emphasized the need for a strong NATO role amid the ongoing Ukraine war. He described freedom as being under attack in a recent address. ‘Freedom Under Attack’: King Charles Urges Strong NATO Role Amid Ukraine War Open Magazine.

articles.title: Trump recalls his mother ‘had a crush’ on King Charles; ‘he’s so cute’
articles.summary: Former US President Trump recalled his mother having a crush on King Charles, describing him as "so cute". This comment was made in a recent public statement. Trump recalls his mother ‘had a crush’ on King Charles; ‘he’s so cute’.

articles.title: जल्द 100% एथेनॉल पर दौड़ेंगी गाड़ियां, हवाई जहाजों के लिए भी ग्रीन फ्यूल की मंजूरी

articles.title: मेटा-गूगल और टिकटॉक पर टैक्स लगाने का प्रस्ताव, पत्रकारों को मिलेगा भुगतान
articles.summary: ऑस्ट्रेलिया ने मेटा, गूगल और टिकटॉक पर टैक्स लगाने का प्रस्ताव रखा है, जिससे पत्रकारों को भुगतान किया जा सके. यह प्रस्ताव इन कंपनियों से राजस्व प्राप्त करने और पत्रकारों को समर्थन देने के लिए है. इससे मीडिया क्षेत्र में नए अवसर पैदा हो सकते हैं.

articles.title: एफबीआई के पूर्व प्रमुख के खिलाफ चलेगा मुकदमा, राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप को जान से मारने की धमकी देने का आरोप
articles.summary: एफबीआई के पूर्व प्रमुख जेम्स कोमी के खिलाफ मुकदमा चलाया जाएगा, उन पर राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप को जान से मारने की धमकी देने का आरोप है. यह मामला न्यायालय में विचाराधीन होगा और इसके परिणामों का इंतजार है. कोमी के खिलाफ यह एक गंभीर आरोप है.

articles.title: 'हम न होते तो आप फ्रेंच बोल रहे होते': ट्रंप के बड़बोलेपन पर किंग चार्ल्स का मजेदार तंज, इतिहास की
articles.summary: किंग चार्ल्स ने ट्रंप के बड़बोलेपन पर मजेदार तंज किया, कहा कि अगर कुछ नहीं होता तो आप फ्रेंच बोल रहे होते. यह टिप्पणी इतिहास की याद दिलाती है और ट्रंप की बयानबाजी पर प्रकाश डालती है. किंग चार्ल्स की टिप्पणी ने चर्चा में जगह बनाई है.

articles.title: 34 लाख अपील दाखिल, सिर्फ़ 1607 नाम जुड़े-प्रक्रिया पर उठे सवाल
articles.summary: सुप्रीम कोर्ट के आदेश के बाद 34 लाख अपीलें दाखिल हुईं, लेकिन सिर्फ 1607 नाम जुड़े. इससे प्रक्रिया पर सवाल उठते हैं और इसकी प्रभावशीलता पर संदेह होता है. राज्य की वोटर लिस्ट से लगभग 91 लाख मतदाताओं को हटा दिया गया.

articles.title: ईरान-अमेरिका संघर्ष अभी सुलझा भी नहीं, दूसरे युद्ध की आहट; चीन ने भेजे दो-दो युद्धपोत
articles.summary: ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच संघर्ष अभी सुलझा नहीं है, और एक दूसरे युद्ध की आहट है। चीन ने इस स्थिति पर दो युद्धपोत भेजे हैं। यह विकास क्षेत्र में तनाव को बढ़ा सकता है और वैश्विक सुरक्षा पर इसका प्रभाव पड़ सकता है।

articles.title: यूएई ने छोड़ा ओपेक और ओपेक प्लस का साथ, क्या ये संगठन के 'अंत की शुरुआत' है?
articles.summary: संयुक्त अरब अमीरात ने घोषणा की है कि वह ओपेक और ओपेक प्लस से बाहर हो रहा है. इस फ़ैसले के असर और ओपेक पर संकट के बादलों पर चर्चा हो रही है. यूएई के इस कदम से ओपेक की संरचना पर सवाल उठ रहे हैं.
